chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1249 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 30.11.2023 Mr. Audho Khan Bhatti, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel submits that in view of the dictum laid down in the case reported in 2023 SCMR 1087, after statutory period of ninety days if his application is not decided, he would file an appeal before the competent authority, and hence does not press this petition. In view of above, this petition is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
